_comment: Apply this redirect block to vercel.json under `redirects` AFTER the canary is at 100% and the legacy /para-anunciantes audience has fully migrated.
_apply_when: All of: (a) FF_LANDING_UNIFICATION=on at 100% in production for >= 7 days, (b) /para-anunciantes traffic in analytics is below 5% of total landing traffic, (c) all internal links migrated to '/' (see PR description, NEEDS DECISION #2).
_how_to_apply: Open vercel.json, locate the `redirects` array, append the entries from the `redirects` field below, commit with message '[post-100pct] Activate 301 /para-anunciantes -> /', deploy.
_how_to_revert: If a regression is detected after the 301 ships, remove the entries from vercel.json and redeploy. Search engines may take 24-72h to refresh; expect a brief SEO dip during revert.
